message:
test(config): add comprehensive unit tests for configuration module

Add 42 unit tests covering:
- Default values for all config structs (SkillPaths, Layers, Disclosure,
  Search, Cass, Cm, Cache, Update, Robot, Safety)
- Serialization roundtrips for each config type
- merge_unique helper function (combining, deduplication, ordering)
- parse_trust_level function (all variants, case-insensitivity, errors)
- Config::load_patch (file loading, TOML parsing, partial configs)
- Config merge behavior (patching, empty patches, multiple sections)
- Config::load integration (explicit path, project config, defaults)

Also add PartialEq/Eq derives to TrustLevel enum to support testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
